steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that the Navajo Nation’s large size and varying elevations lead to different climate conditions across communities. The example sentence requires a July temperature comparison that showcases this contrast.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Option C highlights a 16° difference (Ramah, 83°, vs. Cameron, 99°), directly illustrating the climate variation caused by differing elevations.

The other choices either report identical temperatures (A and D) or describe near-equal differences (B), which contradict the passage’s focus on meaningful climate disparities.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
